# Complete Example

This example demonstrates a full configuration using all key options for this module, including template-based repository creation, merge strategy configuration, and governance settings.

> **Note**: Set `template = null` (or remove the template block) and `auto_init = true` if you want to create a repository without a template. These two options are mutually exclusive.

> **Note**: `security_and_analysis` settings require GitHub Advanced Security (GHAS) or a public repository. See the root module `_header.md` for details.

<!-- markdownlint-disable MD033 -->
## Requirements

The following requirements are needed by this module:

- <a name="requirement_terraform"></a> [terraform](#requirement\_terraform) (>= 1.9, < 2.0)

- <a name="requirement_github"></a> [github](#requirement\_github) (~> 6.12)

## Resources

No resources.

<!-- markdownlint-disable MD013 -->
## Required Inputs

No required inputs.

## Optional Inputs

The following input variables are optional (have default values):

### <a name="input_description"></a> [description](#input\_description)

Description: A short description of the repository.

Type: `string`

Default: `"A complete example repository managed by Terraform."`

### <a name="input_name"></a> [name](#input\_name)

Description: The name of the GitHub repository.

Type: `string`

Default: `"example-complete"`

### <a name="input_template"></a> [template](#input\_template)

Description: Template repository configuration for creating the repository from a template.

Type:

```hcl
object({
    owner                = string
    repository           = string
    include_all_branches = optional(bool, false)
  })
```

Default: `null`

### <a name="input_topics"></a> [topics](#input\_topics)

Description: A list of topics to associate with the repository.

Type: `list(string)`

Default:

```json
[
  "terraform",
  "github",
  "infrastructure"
]
```

### <a name="input_visibility"></a> [visibility](#input\_visibility)

Description: The visibility of the repository.

Type: `string`

Default: `"private"`

## Outputs

The following outputs are exported:

### <a name="output_full_name"></a> [full\_name](#output\_full\_name)

Description: The full name of the repository in the format 'owner/repository'.

### <a name="output_html_url"></a> [html\_url](#output\_html\_url)

Description: The URL to the repository on GitHub.

### <a name="output_http_clone_url"></a> [http\_clone\_url](#output\_http\_clone\_url)

Description: The HTTPS URL to clone the repository.

### <a name="output_name"></a> [name](#output\_name)

Description: The name of the GitHub repository.

### <a name="output_resource_id"></a> [resource\_id](#output\_resource\_id)

Description: The unique identifier of the GitHub repository.

### <a name="output_ssh_clone_url"></a> [ssh\_clone\_url](#output\_ssh\_clone\_url)

Description: The SSH URL to clone the repository.

The following Modules are called:
